must_use: purge expired entries before evicting a live LRU entry in set()
preserve the public API and the existing LRU/TTL semantics
a regression test reproducing the expired-non-LRU + capacity scenario
anti_patterns: no enlarging capacity or disabling eviction
no breaking the existing test suite
no purging only the LRU slot (must reclaim ANY expired entry, not just the oldest)

rubric_for_llm_judge: High quality: set() reclaims expired entries before evicting a live LRU entry (e.g. drop all expired, or scan for an expired slot) so a live entry is never lost while a stale one survives; existing tests untouched; a focused regression test added that fails against the original code. Low quality: special-cases only the LRU entry, mutates capacity, disables eviction, or breaks the existing LRU/TTL tests.
